restaurant.question: What are your hours?
restaurant.answer_template: {business_name} is open {hours}. We look forward to seeing you.

restaurant.question: Do you take reservations?
restaurant.answer_template: Yes, {business_name} takes reservations. Give us a call at {phone} or stop by {address}.

restaurant.question: Is there a dress code?
restaurant.answer_template: {business_name} welcomes everyone. Come as you are and enjoy a warm meal.

restaurant.question: Do you have vegetarian options?
restaurant.answer_template: We have a full selection of vegetarian dishes at {business_name}. Ask your server for recommendations.

restaurant.question: Can I bring my dog?
restaurant.answer_template: {business_name} loves well-behaved pets on our patio. Just let us know when you arrive.

restaurant.question: Do you offer catering?
restaurant.answer_template: Yes, {business_name} caters events of all sizes. Call {phone} to talk through the details.

restaurant.question: What is your most popular dish?
restaurant.answer_template: Guests keep coming back for our house specialties at {business_name}. Ask your server what is flying out of the kitchen tonight.

restaurant.question: Do you have gluten-free options?
restaurant.answer_template: {business_name} offers several gluten-free choices. Just mention your needs and we will take care of you.

restaurant.question: Is there parking nearby?
restaurant.answer_template: There is parking available near {business_name} at {address}. We also validate for the lot next door.

restaurant.question: Can I order online?
restaurant.answer_template: You can order directly through our website or call {phone}. Your AI assistant can also help place an order.

restaurant.question: Do you have a happy hour?
restaurant.answer_template: {business_name} runs happy hour on weekdays. Stop by during {hours} for specials.

restaurant.question: Are you kid-friendly?
restaurant.answer_template: Families are always welcome at {business_name}. We have a kids menu and high chairs available.

restaurant.question: Do you host private events?
restaurant.answer_template: {business_name} hosts private dinners and celebrations. Reach out at {phone} to reserve our back room.

restaurant.question: What safety measures do you follow?
restaurant.answer_template: {business_name} keeps things clean and comfortable. If you have specific concerns, call us at {phone}.

restaurant.question: How do I leave a review?
restaurant.answer_template: We love hearing from you. Leave a review online and know that your feedback helps us grow. There is always room to climb.

dental.question: What are your office hours?
dental.answer_template: {business_name} is open {hours}. We do our best to see you on time.

dental.question: Do you accept new patients?
dental.answer_template: Yes, {business_name} is accepting new patients. Call {phone} to schedule your first visit.

dental.question: What insurance plans do you take?
dental.answer_template: We work with most major insurance providers. Call {phone} and our team will verify your coverage.

dental.question: Do you offer emergency appointments?
dental.answer_template: {business_name} reserves slots for urgent care. If you are in pain, call {phone} right away.

dental.question: Is teeth whitening available?
dental.answer_template: We offer professional whitening at {business_name}. Ask about it during your next cleaning.

dental.question: How often should I get a cleaning?
dental.answer_template: Most patients do well with two cleanings a year. Your AI assistant can remind you when it is time.

dental.question: Do you treat children?
dental.answer_template: {business_name} sees patients of all ages. We make kids feel safe and comfortable.

dental.question: What should I expect at my first visit?
dental.answer_template: Your first visit includes a thorough exam and a conversation about your goals. We are located at {address}.

dental.question: Do you offer payment plans?
dental.answer_template: {business_name} offers flexible payment options. Call {phone} to learn what works for your budget.

dental.question: Is sedation available?
dental.answer_template: We offer options to help anxious patients relax. Just let us know your concerns when you book.

dental.question: How do I prepare for my appointment?
dental.answer_template: Brush and floss as usual, and bring your insurance card. We will take care of the rest at {business_name}.

dental.question: Do you do Invisalign?
dental.answer_template: Yes, {business_name} provides clear aligner consultations. Schedule a visit to see if they are right for you.

dental.question: What COVID precautions do you follow?
dental.answer_template: We follow strict sanitation protocols to keep every patient safe at {business_name}.

dental.question: Can I reschedule online?
dental.answer_template: Call {phone} and we will find a time that works. Your AI assistant can also help with scheduling.

dental.question: Do you offer second opinions?
dental.answer_template: Absolutely. {business_name} believes in transparency. Bring your records and we will review them together.

retail.question: What are your store hours?
retail.answer_template: {business_name} is open {hours}. Stop by whenever it is convenient for you.

retail.question: Do you offer curbside pickup?
retail.answer_template: Yes, order online and pick up at {address}. Call {phone} when you arrive.

retail.question: What is your return policy?
retail.answer_template: {business_name} accepts returns within 30 days with a receipt. We want you to love what you buy.

retail.question: Do you have gift cards?
retail.answer_template: Gift cards are available in any amount. They make a thoughtful present and never expire.

retail.question: Can I check stock before visiting?
retail.answer_template: Call {phone} and we will hold an item for you. We hate it when you make a trip for nothing.

retail.question: Do you price match?
retail.answer_template: {business_name} matches verified competitor prices. Show us the deal and we will honor it.

retail.question: Is there parking?
retail.answer_template: There is parking near {business_name} at {address}. We also validate at the garage next door.

retail.question: Do you ship online orders?
retail.answer_template: We ship nationwide. Your AI assistant can help track your package once it is on the way.

retail.question: Do you have a loyalty program?
retail.answer_template: Yes, sign up in-store or online to earn points on every purchase at {business_name}.

retail.question: Can I order custom items?
retail.answer_template: Custom orders are our specialty. Visit us at {address} or call {phone} to start a conversation.

retail.question: What brands do you carry?
retail.answer_template: {business_name} carries a curated mix of trusted brands. Stop by to see what is new this season.

retail.question: Do you offer personal shopping?
retail.answer_template: Our team loves helping you find the perfect fit. Book a session by calling {phone}.

retail.question: Are you wheelchair accessible?
retail.answer_template: {business_name} is fully accessible. If you need assistance, call ahead and we will be ready.

retail.question: Do you have sales events?
retail.answer_template: We run seasonal sales throughout the year. Sign up for our newsletter to hear about them first.

retail.question: How can I contact customer service?
retail.answer_template: Reach us at {phone} or visit {address}. Your AI assistant is here for quick questions too.

services.question: What are your business hours?
services.answer_template: {business_name} operates {hours}. We are ready when you need us.

services.question: How do I book an appointment?
services.answer_template: Call {phone} or visit {address} to schedule a time that works for you.

services.question: Do you offer free estimates?
services.answer_template: {business_name} provides free estimates. Tell us what you need and we will give you an honest quote.

services.question: What areas do you serve?
services.answer_template: We serve the greater metro area from our base at {address}. Ask us about your specific location.

services.question: Are you licensed and insured?
services.answer_template: {business_name} is fully licensed and insured. We protect your property like it is our own.

services.question: How long will the job take?
services.answer_template: Every project is different. After a quick consultation, we will give you a realistic timeline.

services.question: Do you offer warranties?
services.answer_template: {business_name} stands behind our work. Ask about our warranty when we discuss your project.

services.question: What forms of payment do you accept?
services.answer_template: We accept cash, check, and all major cards. Financing is available for larger projects.

services.question: Can I see reviews or references?
services.answer_template: We are proud of our reputation. Check online reviews or ask us for local references.

services.question: Do you offer emergency service?
services.answer_template: {business_name} has an emergency line. Call {phone} and we will dispatch someone quickly.

services.question: Will you clean up after the job?
services.answer_template: We leave every site cleaner than we found it. That is just how we work at {business_name}.

services.question: Do you work weekends?
services.answer_template: We offer weekend appointments by request. Call {phone} to check availability.

services.question: How do I prepare for your visit?
services.answer_template: Clear the work area of valuables and pets. We will handle the rest when we arrive at {address}.

services.question: Do you use eco-friendly products?
services.answer_template: {business_name} offers green options upon request. Ask during your estimate and we will tailor the plan.

services.question: What happens if something goes wrong?
services.answer_template: We fix it fast, no excuses. {business_name} believes in doing right by our neighbors.

generic.question: What are your hours?
generic.answer_template: {business_name} is open {hours}. We would love to hear from you.

generic.question: How can I reach you?
generic.answer_template: Call us at {phone} or visit us at {address}. Your AI assistant can also answer quick questions.

generic.question: Where are you located?
generic.answer_template: Find us at {address}. We are easy to spot and happy to help with directions if you call {phone}.

generic.question: Do you offer appointments?
generic.answer_template: Yes, call {phone} or stop by {address} to set up a time that works for your schedule.

generic.question: What services do you provide?
generic.answer_template: {business_name} offers a range of services tailored to your needs. Ask us anything specific.

generic.question: Do you have parking?
generic.answer_template: There is parking available at or near {address}. Call {phone} if you need details.

generic.answer_template: {business_name} is accessible to everyone. Let us know if you need any special assistance.

generic.answer_template: We accept all major credit cards, as well as cash and check.

generic.answer_template: Absolutely. Call {phone} or visit {address} and we will give you an honest, no-pressure quote.

generic.answer_template: Follow us online or give us a call. First weekly digest arrives Monday for new activations. We are always here to help.

generic.answer_template: We love referrals at {business_name}. Ask about our neighbor discount when you visit {address}.
